member.name: T:HookCreationDetails
member.summary:
Specifies the details of a hook's creation.

This class contains all the information needed to create a new hook, including the extension point, hook ID, implementation, and optional admin key.

member.name: M:HookCreationDetails.#ctor(HookExtensionPoint,System.Int64,EvmHook,Key)
member.summary: Create new hook creation details with an admin key.
member.param: the extension point for the hook
the ID to create the hook at
the admin key for managing the hook

member.name: M:HookCreationDetails.#ctor(HookExtensionPoint,System.Int64,EvmHook)
member.summary: Create new hook creation details without an admin key.
member.param: the extension point for the hook
the ID to create the hook at

member.name: M:HookCreationDetails.FromProtobuf(Proto.HookCreationDetails)
member.summary: Create HookCreationDetails from a protobuf message.

member.name: M:HookCreationDetails.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert this HookCreationDetails to a protobuf message.
